# llms.txt
# Machine-readable index for AI agents entering this repository.
# Format: key: value pairs, one per line. Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
# Spec reference: https://llmstxt.org

project: agents
description: A collection of per-provider AI agent scaffolds — one folder per provider, each using that provider's native idioms end-to-end (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenAI Codex, Windsurf).
language: Markdown
framework: n/a (template repo — no build pipeline)
runtime: n/a

# --- Repo Structure ---

readme: README.md
shared-principles: shared/principles.md
providers-root: providers/

provider-claude: providers/claude/
provider-copilot: providers/copilot/
provider-cursor: providers/cursor/
provider-gemini: providers/gemini/
provider-codex: providers/codex/
provider-windsurf: providers/windsurf/

# Each provider folder contains: README.md, docs/best-practices.md, docs/anti-patterns.md, scaffold/

# --- Source of Truth ---

canonical-principles: shared/principles.md
# Each provider's scaffold expresses these principles in its own native idiom.
# Change principles.md and sweep every providers/<name>/scaffold/ in lockstep.

# --- Legacy ---

legacy-dir: legacy/.agents/
legacy-readme: legacy/README.md
# Pre-split multi-provider scaffold. Preserved for migration reference. Not maintained.

# --- This Repo's Own Contract ---

# This repo is dogfooded — it uses one of its own scaffolds for the meta-project.
agents-md: AGENTS.md
claude-md: CLAUDE.md

# --- Secrets Policy ---

secrets-policy: This repo holds no secrets and must never. Scaffolds reference env var NAMES only.
agent-no-read: .env, .env.*, .envrc, .dev.vars*, secrets.*, *.pem, *.key, *.p12, *.pfx, id_rsa*, .npmrc, .pypirc, ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.config/gcloud/, gha-creds-*.json, .terraformrc
